production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM explorer: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"], "score": [0.5, 0.8]})
df = df.set_index("cliente_id")
print(df.index.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: T1-A: DataFrame con Index; set_index('cliente_id') y index.tolist() reportan las etiquetas.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([0.1, 0.9], index=["C001", "C002"], name="score")
print(s["C002"])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Series vector con Index; acceso por etiqueta s['C002'] devuelve 0.9 (T1-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s1 = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0], index=["C001", "C002"])
s2 = pd.Series([0.5], index=["C002"])
out = s1.add(s2, fill_value=0).sort_index()
print(out.to_dict())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Alineación por Index con add/fill_value y sort_index (T1-A); unión de etiquetas.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO
csv = "a,b\n1,NA\n2,3\n"
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(csv), na_values=["NA"])
print(int(df["b"].isna().sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: read_csv con na_values marca 'NA' como missing; isna().sum() cuenta en b (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO
csv = "fecha,v\n2024-01-01,1\n2024-02-01,2\n"
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(csv), parse_dates=["fecha"])
print(str(df["fecha"].dtype))
exercises.justification_from_packet: parse_dates en read_csv fija datetime64[ns] (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO
csv = "cliente_id,monto,z\nC001,10,x\n"
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(csv), usecols=["cliente_id", "monto"])
print(df.columns.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: usecols limita columnas del parser y evita object-dtypes ruidosos (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"], "score": [0.4, 0.9]})
print(df.loc[df.score >= 0.5, "cliente_id"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: loc con etiqueta + máscara booleana filtra filas score>=0.5 (T2-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"score": [1.0, 2.0]})
print(df.assign(doble=df["score"] * 2)["doble"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: assign crea columna sin mutación in-place obligatoria (T2-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame([[1, 2], [3, 4]])
print(int(df.iloc[1, 0]))
exercises.justification_from_packet: iloc es posicional puro (T2-A): fila 1 col 0 devuelve 3 del fixture; no depende de etiquetas del Index como loc.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"score": [0.2, 0.9]})
df.loc[df.score < 0.5, "flag"] = "x"
print(df["flag"].fillna("").tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Asignar con loc evita chained assignment; fillna('') para imprimir lista (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"score": [0.2, 0.9, 0.7]})
subset = df.loc[df.score > 0.5].copy()
subset["ok"] = True
print(subset["ok"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: copy() antes de mutar el subset evita SettingWithCopyWarning (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"score": [1.0, 2.0]})
c = df.copy()
c.iloc[0, 0] = 99
print(df["score"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: copy es independiente: mutar c no cambia el DF original (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["lima", "Lima"]})
df["region"] = df["region"].str.title().astype("category")
print(df["region"].dtype.name)
exercises.justification_from_packet: str.title + astype('category') reduce memoria y unifica labels (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.to_numeric(pd.Series(["1", "a", "3"]), errors="coerce")
print([float(v) if pd.notna(v) else float("nan") for v in s])
exercises.justification_from_packet: errors='coerce' convierte inválidos a NaN; se imprime la lista con nan (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.to_datetime(pd.Series(["2024-01-01", "no-fecha"]), errors="coerce")
print(int(s.isna().sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: to_datetime coerce produce NaT; isna cuenta ausencias (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": ["1", "x"]})
before = df["monto"].isna().sum()
num = pd.to_numeric(df["monto"], errors="coerce")
print(int(num.isna().sum() - before))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Coerción explícita: to_numeric introduce NaN en inválidos; se reporta el delta (T3-B).
Schema dict: columna ausente → KeyError/fail-closed con mensaje missing (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series(["C001"]).astype("string")
print(str(s.dtype))
exercises.justification_from_packet: astype('string') usa el dtype string de pandas (T3-A/T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1], "b": [2]})
buf = StringIO()
df.to_csv(buf, index=False)
buf.seek(0)
print(pd.read_csv(buf).columns.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: to_csv/read_csv redondean el contrato de columnas sin índice (T4-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
from io import BytesIO
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1]})
bio = BytesIO()
df.to_excel(bio, index=False, engine="openpyxl")
print(len(bio.getvalue()) > 0)
exercises.justification_from_packet: to_excel a BytesIO con openpyxl; bytes>0 valida export (T4-A).
Contrato Parquet/schema JSON: dict col→dtype string (T4-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": ["Lima", "Cusco"]})
mem = int(df.memory_usage(deep=True).sum())
print(mem > 0)
exercises.justification_from_packet: memory_usage(deep=True).sum mide presupuesto de memoria (T4-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1, 2, 3]})
manifest = {"rows": len(df), "columns": df.columns.tolist()}
print(manifest["rows"], manifest["columns"])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Manifest mínimo: filas y columnas del artefacto (T4-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd, hashlib
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1]})
blob = df.to_csv(index=False).encode("utf-8")
print(hashlib.sha1(blob).hexdigest()[:8])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Provenance: sha1 de to_csv(index=False) y primeros 8 hex (T4-B).

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: T2-A: loc usa etiquetas de index/columnas; iloc es posicional.
T2-B: SettingWithCopyWarning aparece al asignar sobre slices que pueden ser view/copy (chained assignment).
T3-A/T3-B: errors='coerce' en to_numeric convierte inválidos a NaN.
T4-B: manifest registra filas, columnas, dtypes, memoria y provenance/hash.
